# aquasec_secure_ai_integration (Data Source)

Provides the current Secure AI integration settings configured in Aqua.

~> **Note:** The server clears sensitive fields (`api_key`, `id`) on read. These fields will be empty in the data source output.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "aquasec_secure_ai_integration" "example" {}

output "secure_ai_selected_ui" {
  value = data.aquasec_secure_ai_integration.example.selected_ui
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `akamai` (List of Object) Akamai Secure AI provider configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--akamai))
- `aqua` (List of Object) Aqua Secure AI provider configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--aqua))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `selected_ui` (String) The selected UI provider for Secure AI.

<a id="nestedatt--akamai"></a>
### Nested Schema for `akamai`

Read-Only:

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) API key for the Secure AI provider.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this Secure AI provider is enabled.
- `id` (String) Identifier for the Secure AI provider.
- `mode` (String) Mode of the Secure AI provider (`external` or `internal`).


<a id="nestedatt--aqua"></a>
### Nested Schema for `aqua`

Read-Only:

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) API key for the Secure AI provider.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this Secure AI provider is enabled.
- `id` (String) Identifier for the Secure AI provider.
- `mode` (String) Mode of the Secure AI provider (`external` or `internal`).
